mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO om_auth_group_menu_r ( auth_group_cd, menu_id, system_main_cd, system_sub_cd, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{authGroupCd}, #{menuId}, #{systemMainCd}, #{systemSubCd}, #{userId}, #{userId}, false )
ON CONFLICT (auth_group_cd, menu_id) DO UPDATE SET system_main_cd = EXCLUDED.system_main_cd , system_sub_cd = EXCLUDED.system_sub_cd , is_deleted = false , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by
